news.headline: CNX Resources Corp. to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 24 at 6:45 a.m. Eastern Time. Press release to follow.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 2, 2025, it was reported that CNX Resources Corp. (NYSE: CNX) is scheduled to release its financial results for Q1 2025 at 6:45 a.m. EST on Thursday, April 24. The announcement will include a concise press release providing access to the company's prepared remarks for the quarter.

news.headline: RPC, Inc. acquires Pintail Completions for $245 million, expanding Permian operations.
news.summary: Atlanta, April 2, 2025 - RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) revealed the successful acquisition of Pintail Alternative Energy, L.L.C. ("Pintail"), operating as "Pintail Completions". The acquisition, finalized on April 1, 2025, amounted to around $245 million. This transaction is subject to standard procedures and regulations.

news.headline: Singlewire Software recognized as a top mid-sized company in Madison area by Wisconsin State Journal for the fifth consecutive year.
news.summary: Singlewire Software, a company based in Madison, Wisconsin, has been hailed as a top mid-sized company in the region by the Wisconsin State Journal. The company specializes in developing solutions aimed at enhancing safety and communication. This recognition marks their fifth year in a row achieving this status.

news.headline: Parsons Corporation selected for PFAS investigation at Tucson Airport, covering source area delineation and remedy feasibility.
news.summary: Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) has been chosen by Tucson Airport Authority (TAA) to conduct a per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) facility investigation at Tucson International Airport (TUS). The agreement includes tasks such as source area delineation, offsite source differentiation, and remedy feasibility assessment related to TAA’s use of PFAS containing aqueous film forming foam (AFFF). This contract demonstrates Parsons’ commitment to assisting clients in dealing with PFAS issues in a efficient and budget-conscious manner. The announcement was made in Chantilly, Va. on April 02, 2025.

news.headline: Franklin Covey (NYSE:FC) to release Q2 results on April 2. Analysts predict loss of 6 cents per share, revenue of $62.65M. Shares rose 1.4% to close at $28.00.
news.summary: Franklin Covey Co. (NYSE:FC) is set to reveal its second-quarter financial results on April 2. Analysts anticipate a loss of 6 cents per share, contrasting with last year's profit of 19 cents per share. The company, based in Salt Lake City, Utah, is expected to report quarterly revenue of $62.65 million, up from $61.34 million a year ago. In its first quarter, Franklin Covey disappointed with results. The company's shares closed at $28.00 on Tuesday, up by 1.4%. Detailed information is available on Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Keepit unveils roadmap to enhance data protection for organizations facing cyber threats. SaaS backup lacking, leaving data vulnerable.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, Keepit, the sole independent, cloud-native data protection, backup, and recovery provider, revealed a product roadmap aimed at ensuring the cyber resilience of organizations confronting a more intricate threat environment. With the swift integration of SaaS applications by companies, the backup and recovery systems have lagged behind, jeopardizing crucial business data to outages, cyber threats, and compliance issues. This initiative addresses the need for enhanced data protection in the face of growing digital risks.

news.headline: Superior Plus raises its Superior Delivers target to $70M+, unveils 2027 financial goals at Investor Day in Toronto.
news.summary: Today in Toronto, Superior Plus Corp. (TSX: SPB), a major distributor of propane, CNG, renewable energy, and related products in North America, will hold its 2025 Investor Day. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, April 2, 2025, from 8:30 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. ET. President and CEO Allan MacDonald, CFO Grier Colter, and other key leaders will showcase the company’s strategic plans.

news.headline: Anthony Scaramucci supports Trump's cryptocurrency policies, despite being a vocal critic; praises President for advancing digital asset regulation, but acknowledges risks.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, a prominent cryptocurrency advocate and founder of SkyBridge Capital, has expressed mixed views on President Trump's stance on cryptocurrency. Despite criticizing Trump on issues like tariffs and economic growth, Scaramucci has acknowledged Trump's positive actions regarding digital asset regulation. Scaramucci praised Trump for sparking bipartisan conversations on cryptocurrency during the peak of the presidential campaign. He has emphasized that he is not a single-issue voter and recognizes the risks associated with Trump's presidency, despite appreciating his efforts to promote Bitcoin.

news.headline: Tutors International analyzes Finland's education model for private tutoring, aiming to improve learning outcomes.
news.summary: In Oxford, England, on April 2, 2025, a prominent private tutoring company known as Tutors International has published a recent analysis focusing on Finland's renowned education system. This commentary delves into the essential elements that contribute to Finland's educational success and explores ways to implement these principles for improved learning outcomes.

news.headline: Mobileye chooses Valens' VA7000 MIPI A-PHY chipsets for autonomous driving. Collaboration with EyeQ™6 chip. Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN).
news.summary: Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN), a top performer in high-performance connectivity, has unveiled its optimized optical path collaboration for use on specific production programs utilizing the Mobileye EyeQ™6 High system-on-chip. The news was released from HOD HASHARON, Israel on April 2, 2025. This update signifies a significant development for Valens, which is well-known for its expertise in the field.

news.headline: Harbor IT launches as premier cyber-first MSP for SMBs, bridging technical specializations for 5 founding members.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Boston, Harbor IT was officially launched as the leading cyber-focused managed IT services provider for small and mid-sized businesses. The company combines expertise in various technical areas from five founding members.

news.headline: Wyndham Hotels (NYSE: WH) will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 30, 2025 at 4:30 p.m. ET and host a conference call on May 1 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: WH) will be holding a conference call and webcast on May 1, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company is set to report its first quarter 2025 results on April 30, 2025, around 4:30 p.m. ET. This announcement was made on April 2, 2025, in Parsippany, New Jersey.

news.headline: Shift Technology introduces Insurance Data Network (IDN) for cross-carrier data sharing, providing fraud and risk insights.
news.summary: In a recent development, Shift Technology has unveiled the Insurance Data Network (IDN), which provides valuable fraud and risk insights generated from shared data among insurers. The company, known for its AI-driven decision optimization solutions for the insurance sector, launched IDN on April 2, 2025, in Boston and Paris. This initiative aims to leverage collective data to enhance fraud detection and risk management strategies within the global insurance market, benefiting from the collaboration among industry players. The IDN is set to offer actionable insights drawn from a vast pool of shared insurer data, potentially influencing the industry's approach to mitigating fraud and improving risk assessment. This move signifies a significant step towards more efficient and informed decision-making processes within the insurance sector, with promising implications for combating fraudulent activities and enhancing overall risk management practices.

news.headline: ECB's Schnabel: Trade fragmentation is structurally harmful for economic growth and inflation.
Trimble introduces new APIs for Accubid Anywhere, aiding data analysis and collaboration for electrical contractors.
news.summary: In Westminster, Colorado on April 2, 2025, Trimble® revealed new APIs for Trimble Accubid® Anywhere, aimed at improving data analysis and collaboration for electrical contractors. This automation is set to streamline processes and enhance connectivity for users. Trimble®'s stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TRMB.

news.headline: Queue-it joins Akamai's Qualified Compute Partner Program boosting cloud computing services partnership, Date: April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Akamai Technologies Inc., a cybersecurity and cloud computing company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, made an announcement on April 2, 2025, that Queue-it has become the newest member of the Akamai Qualified Compute Partner Program. Akamai Technologies is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol AKAM. This partnership signifies a significant move for Akamai as they continue to strengthen their network of partners in the industry. Queue-it's inclusion in the program highlights the company's increasing focus on enhancing its services and offerings in the cybersecurity and cloud computing sectors.

news.headline: Trilogy Metals released Q1 2025 financial results, with details contained in the interim report - Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: Trilogy Metals Inc., a company listed on both TSX and NYSE American under the symbols TMQ, has released its financial results for the first quarter ending on February 28, 2025. The details of the financial performance during this period can be found in the interim report.

news.headline: Integra Resources appoints US Air Force General as board advisor and submits revised mine plan.Ticker: TSXV: ITR; NYSE American: ITRG
news.summary: Integra Resources Corp. (TSXV: ITR, NYSE American: ITRG) based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed the submission of the revised Mine Plan of Operations (MPO) to the U.S. The update was officially announced on April 2, 2025. To learn more about Integra Resources, visit www.integraresources.com.

news.headline: Kraken Robotics acquires 3D at Depth, a subsea services company specializing in LiDAR imaging.
news.summary: Kraken Robotics Inc. based in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, reported on April 2, 2025, that it has successfully acquired 3D at Depth Inc. through one of its subsidiaries. The acquisition was completed based on the terms outlined in the company's press release from March 13, 2025. 3D at Depth is known for its expertise in high-resolution LiDAR imaging and measurements in the subsea services sector. Kraken Robotics trades on the TSX-V under the ticker symbol PNG and on the OTCQB under the ticker symbol KRKNF.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data reports mining 56 Bitcoin in 2025, totaling 3,061 Bitcoin since 2021.
news.summary: Las Vegas, on April 2, 2025, Hyperscale Data, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary Sentinum, Inc. has extracted roughly 56 Bitcoin between January 1, 2025, and March 31, 2025. This brings their total Bitcoin mined since March 2021 to about 3,061. Hyperscale Data is listed on NYSE American under the symbol GPUS.

news.headline: Oil company Black Gold discovers multiple pay zones in successful Fritz Well drill program.
news.summary: Black Gold has confirmed the successful conclusion of the Fritz Well drill initiative. The drilling program consisted of {number} wells being drilled over a course of {number} days. The company has revealed that this project will add {number} barrels of oil to its production reserves. This achievement marks a significant milestone for Black Gold in its efforts to expand its oil output and enhance its overall operational capabilities.

news.headline: Planet 13 opens new 4,680 sq. ft. dispensary in Orange Park, FL, serving Jacksonville patients, its 32nd in Florida.
news.summary: Planet 13 Holdings Inc., a prominent multi-state cannabis company, revealed the launch of its 32nd Florida dispensary on April 4th and 5th, 2025, in Orange Park. Situated at 921 N Blanding Blvd, Orange Park, FL, the dispensary spans 4,680 square feet and aims to cater to the medical cannabis community in Jacksonville and nearby areas. Operating hours will be from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m., seven days a week, 365 days a year.

news.headline: Enovis names Damien McDonald as new CEO, effective May 12, 2025. Q1 revenue expected $555-563M, adjusted EBITDA $97-100M.
news.summary: Enovis™ Corporation, a leading company in medical technology on the NYSE under the symbol ENOV, has appointed Damien McDonald as the new Chief Executive Officer effective May 12, 2025. Mr. McDonald will also join the company's Board of Directors after the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 21. This announcement comes as Matt Trerotola, the previous CEO, revealed his plans to retire and will not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual Meeting. Enovis has indicated expected first quarter revenues to be between $555 million to $563 million, with adjusted EBITDA projected to fall within $97 million to $100 million.

news.headline: Telenor's KNL signs 10-yr contract with Finnish and Swedish Defence Forces through NORDEFCO for military tech.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Telenor's subsidiary KNL ventured into the defense sector by securing a ten-year deal with the Finnish and Swedish Defense Forces via NORDEFCO. This agreement focuses on providing cutting-edge military communication technology.

news.headline: Crude oil production rises prior to OPEC+ supply boost, nearing 100 million barrels/day.
EU spokesperson, on 'liberation day': EU response will happen at the appropriate moment
French Government Spokeswoman Primas: France is expecting powerful Trump tariffs in the range of 20-25 pct.
Valmet's Interim Review for Jan-Mar 2025 releases on April 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Finnish time. Press release on Apr 2 at 1:00 p.m. EEST.
news.summary: Valmet Oyj announced on April 2, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland, that its Interim Review for January–March 2025 is scheduled for release on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, around 9:00 a.m. Finnish time (EEST). The stock exchange release containing key financial information will be made available along with the interim review.

news.headline: Edgewise Therapeutics prices $200M stock offering, sells 9,935,419 shares at $20.13 each.
news.summary: A muscle disease biopharmaceutical company based in Boulder, Colorado, Edgewise Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: EWTX), revealed the pricing details of an underwritten offering on April 2, 2025. The offering consists of 9,935,419 shares of its common stock priced at $20.13 per share. This move signifies a significant step for the company in terms of financial operations.

news.headline: Parabellyx introduces "Luma Security" brand for continuous testing platforms combining penetration, app security, & compliance.
news.summary: "Parabellyx, a prominent cybersecurity testing solutions provider, has launched a new brand named Luma Security. This brand brings together Continuous Penetration Testing, Continuous Application Security Testing, and Continuous Compliance Monitoring. The announcement was made in Richmond Hill, ON and Denver on April 2, 2025. This move aims to streamline and optimize cybersecurity practices by unifying these essential services under one umbrella. The incorporation of Luma Security consolidates key cybersecurity measures, enhancing efficiency and overall security of organizations. This initiative is poised to revolutionize the cybersecurity sector and facilitate better preparedness against emerging threats."

news.headline: Investment Adviser Association launches revamped Career Center with AI tech by SmartJobBoard. Improves hiring for talent and employers. Washington and Denver, Apr 2, 2025. (Characters: 146)
news.summary: Utilizing state-of-the-art AI matching technology, the updated platform offers an improved hiring process for both job seekers and employers. The company, SmartJobBoard, known for its AI-driven job board solutions, operates in Washington and Denver. This development was announced on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: #CleanerAirHaircare initiative launched to evaluate salon air quality in New York and New Jersey by Citizen Scientist, amika, and Airthings.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025 in New York, it was announced that Citizen Scientist, amika, and Airthings have joined forces for the #CleanerAirHaircare project. This collaboration aims to assess indoor air quality and associated health hazards in salons within the amika network. The initiative will kick off by analyzing the air quality in a significant number of salons to understand the potential risks.

news.headline: Carrington Mortgage Services is Non-Stop Non-QM
news.summary: In Anaheim, California, Carrington Mortgage Services' correspondent channel is now focusing solely on underwriting and acquiring non-QM loans. This decision means that the company will be dedicated to handling and purchasing loans that fall outside of the qualified mortgage criteria.

news.headline: Atlanta Braves Holdings acquires Pennant Park complex near Battery Atlanta with 763,465 sq ft on 34 acres, 2,700 parking spaces.
news.summary: Atlanta Braves Holdings, Inc. revealed the purchase of Pennant Park by Braves Development Company. Pennant Park, a six-building office complex near The Battery Atlanta, spans 763,465 sq ft on 34 acres with 2,700 parking spots. Acquired from Rubenstein Partners, who owned it since 2017, the property accommodates 24 tenants from various industries. The deal involves the Nasdaq-listed Atlanta Braves Holdings, Inc. under the tickers BATRA and BATRK.

news.headline: CareTrust REIT acquires 2 CA facilities for $55 million. Includes 150-bed nursing and 140-bed care facilities.
news.summary: In San Clemente, California, CareTrust REIT, Inc. (NYSE: CTRE) has revealed the purchase of two properties through distinct deals, amounting to a combined investment of roughly $55 million. One of the acquisitions, concluded on April 1, 2025, encompassed a skilled nursing and assisted living campus in Los Alamitos, California. This campus boasts a 150-bed skilled nursing facility along with a 140-bed residential care facility for the elderly. CareTrust's latest acquisition enhances its portfolio in the healthcare real estate sector.

news.headline: Trump family-backed American Bitcoin Corp, plans to go public in the future. Majority owner Hut 8 aims for vertical integration.
news.summary: A new Bitcoin mining company called American Bitcoin Corp. has been established, and it is supported by President Donald Trump's sons. The company is looking to eventually become publicly traded. Asher Genoot, the CEO of Hut 8, which holds the majority ownership of American Bitcoin, discussed the company's plans in an interview with Bloomberg TV. He mentioned a future strategy of having two separate publicly traded entities: one focusing on energy, infrastructure data centers (Hut 8), and the other on Bitcoin, AISCs, and reserves (American Bitcoin). Genoot explained that the goal is to create a vertically integrated company with strong financial prospects. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NETSCOUT reports DDoS attacks on critical infrastructure play key role in cyberwarfare, linked to sociopolitical events.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts, NETSCOUT SYSTEMS, INC. shared its latest insights in the 2H2024 DDoS Threat Intelligence Report. The report, focused on Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks, highlights their prevalence in cyberwarfare tactics connected to sociopolitical occurrences like elections, civil unrest, and policy disagreements. The research underlines a concerning trend where cyber attackers capitalize on periods of national susceptibility to escalate disruptions and undermine faith in crucial institutions. The analysis provided valuable data on the increasing use of DDoS attacks to target critical infrastructure.

news.headline: Stuart Vaeth, Trua SVP, to speak at Curbivore 2025 about trust & safety in gig economy. Industry veteran tackles reducing risk.
news.summary: A seasoned professional in the digital trust and identity sector, Vaeth is set to participate in a panel talk focusing on enhancing trust and safety while minimizing risk in the shared economy. The event, named Curbivore, will take place in McLean, Virginia on April 2, 2025. This event is renowned for delving into the technological and mobility realms, exploring innovative solutions to pertinent issues.

news.headline: Discussion on Trump's tariffs near deadline.
American Lung Association marks 10 Years of LUNG FORCE Advocacy Day on April 9, with lung cancer survivors advocating for a cure in Washington.
news.summary: The American Lung Association is marking a significant milestone as they commemorate the 10th anniversary of LUNG FORCE Advocacy Day on April 9, 2025. This event will see LUNG FORCE Heroes, individuals directly affected by lung cancer, convene in Washington in a display of powerful advocacy and achievements over the past decade. Participants from various locations will gather to support this cause.

news.headline: Coleman® debuts new Pro Coolers, known for extreme durability and easy transport. Innovation in outdoor gear.
news.summary: Atlanta - Coleman®, a trusted brand for outdoor gear for more than 125 years, has unveiled its latest product: Coleman Pro Coolers. These coolers are built with top-notch durability, advanced insulation, and easy portability, setting a benchmark in the outdoor gear sector. This new innovation is designed to provide outdoor enthusiasts with a reliable and high-performance cooling solution. The Coleman Pro Cooler aims to revolutionize the market with its robust features.

news.headline: Dunkin' introduces Arctic Cherry Energy drink and seasonal treats for spring, including Blueberry Sprinkle MUNCHKINS®.
news.summary: In Boston, Dunkin’ is introducing exciting limited-time menu items this spring season. Available nationwide from today, the menu includes Arctic Cherry Dunkin’ Energy, a new cherry-flavored iced beverage part of the expanding energy drink range. Additionally, customers can enjoy the new festive offerings in the bakery case, such as the Spring MUNCHKINS® Bucket. This option showcases the new Blueberry Sprinkle MUNCHKINS® and aims to bring a touch of joy to customers during this season. Don't miss out on these fresh and energizing treats!

news.headline: Krispy Kreme and Fruity PEBBLES collaborate on limited-edition Milk Glaze Doughnuts available for four days only (April 3-6).
news.summary: Krispy Kreme and Fruity PEBBLES have joined forces to introduce the limited-time Krispy Kreme x Fruity PEBBLES Milk Original Glazed Doughnuts in Charlotte, N.C. Available from April 3-6, these unique treats feature a classic ring doughnut topped with a Fruity Pebbles Milk flavored glaze, offering a delightful taste reminiscent of the popular cereal. This collaboration aims to excite taste buds with a blend of sweet and fruity flavors.

news.headline: LawToolBox Agent enhances Microsoft 365 Copilot into AI tool for legal with client matter containers and prompt library.
news.summary: LawToolBox offers client matter containers within Microsoft 365. Alongside its customizable prompt library, Copilot can provide precise responses to legal professionals by having the necessary context. This was emphasized in the news on April 2, 2025 in Denver. Copilot's ability to generate accurate and well-informed responses is strengthened by being integrated with LawToolBox in Microsoft 365.

news.headline: Double Eagle Energy and Tumbleweed Royalty form Double Eagle Energy Holdings V & Tumbleweed Royalty V with $2.5B equity.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas and Houston, a partnership between EnCap Investments L.P. and the team behind Double Eagle companies revealed the launch of Double Eagle Energy Holdings V, LLC and Tumbleweed Royalty V, LLC. The new entities have received $2.5 billion in committed equity. This partnership expansion includes support from Double Eagle management and Elda River Capital Management.

news.headline: Lomiko Metals announces private placement aiming to raise up to $1,000,000 from the sale of 4,444,444 units at $0.135 per unit.
news.summary: Lomiko Metals Inc. is excited to reveal a non-brokered private placement (the “Offering”) intended to generate up to C$1,000,000 in aggregate gross proceeds. The Offering involves selling up to 4,444,444 units of the Company at a rate of C$0.135 per Unit, potentially resulting in C$600,000 in gross proceeds from the Unit sales. Each Unit will include one Common Share, leading to a significant investment opportunity for interested parties.

news.headline: Organigram Global to host OG Investor Session on April 10, 2025, for investors. Announcement of name change on TSX and NASDAQ.
news.summary: A cannabis leader in Canada by market share, Organigram Global Inc. (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI) will host its first virtual investor event, the OG Investor Session on April 10, 2025, at 4pm EST. This event will provide attendees with insights into the company's growth trajectory and the opportunity to engage with leadership on key industry topics.

news.headline: FreeCast launches NextGen Streaming TV app in Orlando, integrating wireless technologies, streaming services, and local broadcast.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, NextGen Streaming TV, developed by FreeCast, integrates cutting-edge wireless technologies, streaming services, and local broadcasts into one app accessible on all platforms.

news.headline: SolarWinds releases new IT solutions to boost operational resiliency with expanded observability and AI automation. #SWI
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SolarWinds (NYSE: SWI) revealed advancements to aid businesses in attaining IT operational resilience. The updated SolarWinds range now includes improved features in observability, incident response, service management, and AI-driven automation. These enhancements empower IT teams to effectively handle hybrid environments and swiftly resolve issues.

news.headline: Americans are working to tackle high debt, as Experian released findings from a national survey on financial management.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, new research by Experian reveals insights into how Americans are handling their finances amidst high levels of debt. The national survey sheds light on effective strategies individuals are using to manage their financial situations.
